zh.Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯
zh.St. Andrew's Priory, Northamptonshire, E: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾
zh.Huntington, Huntingdonshire, England: 英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Senlis III於大約1145年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯時，他的父親Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton49歲，母親Isabelle de Beaumont26歲。他於大約1163年與Alice Gant在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1184年6月在他的家鄉享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾。

zh-hans.Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England: 英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯

zh-hans.Huntington, Huntingdonshire, England: 英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon de Senlis III于大约1145年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯时，他的父亲Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton49岁，母亲Isabelle de Beaumont26岁。他于大约1163年与Alice Gant在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1184年6月在他的家乡享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Senlis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Efren, Alberto, Francisco, Manuel, Camilo, Carlos, Fernando, Juan, Juanita, Mario, Ofelia.

English: variant of Sale with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. The Middle English plural form was probably often in variation with the singular form. The surname is uncommon in southwestern England but may derive there from Zeals (Wiltshire), and also from the plural form of Old English sealh ‘willow’; see Seal .
Catalan, Spanish, and French (Occitan): habitational name from any of the places called Sales, like Sales de Llierca (Catalonia), from the plural of   Sala   1. Compare   De Sales  .

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Senlis III was born about 1145, in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, was 49 and his mother, Isabelle de Beaumont, was 26. He married Alice Gant about 1163, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about June 1184, in his hometown, at the age of 40, and was buried in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Senlis III est né environ 1145, à Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Beaumont, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alice Gant environ 1163, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ juin 1184, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon de Senlis III um 1145 in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton 49 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Beaumont 26. Er hat um 1163 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Gant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um Juni 1184 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Senlis III è nato il circa 1145 nel Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de Beaumont, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Alice Gant circa 1163, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa giugno 1184, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワークウオルス
ja.Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイア

ja.Huntington, Huntingdonshire, England: イギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Simon de Senlis IIIが約1145年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワークウオルスで生まれた時，父Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northamptonは49歳，母Isabelle de Beaumontは26歳であった。約1163年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでAlice Gantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1184年6月に故郷で40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Senlis III(이)가 대략 1145년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 워k워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Beaumont(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1163년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Alice Gant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1184년 6월 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에 묻혔다.

mg.Abt 1145–Abt June 1184: tany ho any amin'ny 1145–tany ho any amin'ny jona 1184

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Senlis III nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Beaumont, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Gant aproximadamente 1163, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente junho de 1184, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Senlis III родился около 1145 г. в местности варкворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Beaumont, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Gant около 1163 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около июнь 1184 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.Abt 1145–Abt June 1184: e tusa o le 1145–e tusa o le Iuni 1184

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon de Senlis III nació aproximadamente 1145, en Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon II de Senlis 4th Earl of Northampton, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Beaumont, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Alice Gant aproximadamente 1163, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente junio de 1184, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
